title: Workhorse Introduces the W56 Extended Wheelbase Version
text:
Workhorse Introduces the W56 Extended Wheelbase Version

Date: July 10, 2024

Article Summary

Workhorse Group Inc. announced the release of its W56 electric delivery van with an extended 208-inch wheelbase. This newer version is designed to accommodate a 22-foot step van body with 1,200 cubic feet of cargo capacity.

The vehicle builds on the success of the original 178-inch wheelbase W56 model while incorporating over 100 refinements. According to Chief Technology Officer Josh Anderson: This next-generation electric vehicle sets a new standard for efficiency and versatility.

Key Specifications

Payload capacity up to approximately 10,000 pounds. Range up to 150 miles. Enhanced service access and multiple charge port options. Modular accessories for various commercial applications.

Production Timeline

The company has already secured an order from a customer who needed the larger variant. Standard production begins in Q3 2024 at the Union City, Indiana assembly facility, with initial customer deliveries expected in Q4 2024.

Company Focus

Workhorse specializes in battery-electric trucks and cloud-based telematics systems for last-mile delivery operations.
